infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Trakvora uses your location to track shipments and show nearby loads.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Trakvora uses your location in the background to broadcast GPS position while driving.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Trakvora uses the camera for delivery proof photos and document uploads.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Trakvora accesses your photos to upload profile pictures and documents.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow Trakvora to use your location for shipment tracking.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow Trakvora to use your camera for delivery proof and document uploads.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow Trakvora to access your photos for profile and document uploads.
